issues.title: Replace prose-based state.json contracts with typed Rust state_transition IPC
Add automated test suite — start with state.rs deserialization fixtures and store reducers
Corruption recovery UX — detect unparseable state.json and offer one-click backup restore

description: Foundational reliability release: replace fragile Claude-driven state.json prose contracts with a typed Rust IPC (#144), establish an automated test suite for Rust deserialization and TS stores (#145), and turn the existing-but-unwired backup primitives into a real corruption recovery UX (#146). Together: a structural fix, a safety net, and user-facing reliability.
